books.title: The Single Dad's Fake Mate
books.logline: I never thought I'd be pregnant and on the run, or that my salvation would come in the form of an Alpha lion shifter.

books.title: Guarding the Manny's Fanny
books.logline: Ten years ago, he walked away because I couldn't give him cubs. Now he's hired me as his son's manny, and I'm about to learn I had it all wrong.

books.title: Knot His Cherry Boy
books.logline: I've never been touched by an alpha and I hired a bodyguard to keep it that way. Too bad he's the one alpha I can't resist.

books.title: Knotting the Playboy Omega
books.logline: No alpha can resist my pheromones, until I met the one who can. And of course, he's the only one who can help me claim my inheritance.

books.title: Claimed by the Alpha Laird
books.logline: Your body was made for me.

books.title: Mated to the Beast Alpha
books.logline: They call him the Beast of the Highlands.

books.title: Taken by the Titan
books.logline: When I stole from the titan prince, I didn't expect him to steal me.

books.title: Taken by the Titan: Homecoming
books.logline: Across worlds, their love remains unbreakable.

books.title: Property of the Leviathan
books.logline: Everything in his ocean belongs to him, including me.

books.title: Sold! To the Beast Lord
books.logline: Lord. Master. Beast. He's all three and he's mine.

standalones.title: Blood Curse
standalones.logline: When an isolated Fae Mystic discovers his fated mate has a blood fetish, burns in the sun… and could be the bloodsucking enemy of his kind…

standalones.title: Brass Knuckle Alpha
standalones.logline: An alpha's strength. An omega's secret. A bond neither of them wanted, but both desperately need.

standalones.title: Bred by the Alien Prince
standalones.logline: A stowaway. An alien prince. Everything gone wrong. They never expected to steal each other's hearts.

standalones.title: Dracula: Bound in Blood
standalones.logline: Bound by Blood, Freed by Desire.

standalones.title: Fixing the Grumpy Pumpkin King
standalones.logline: There's a six-foot-five autumn deity with a literal pumpkin for a head living in my grandmother's mystical shop, and Lord Mabon is the most difficult roommate I've ever had.

standalones.title: Marked Under the Chained Moon
standalones.logline: I woke up covered in blood with my dead alpha by my side.

standalones.title: Umami
standalones.logline: He craves victory. He hungers for him.

standalones.title: Wolf-In-Law Daddy
standalones.logline: In a world without law, love is the deadliest sin.
